<explanation>
The query image shows a cluster of flowers with pink and white petals, having a distinctive red center and a ruffled edge. This visual pattern closely matches the characteristics observed in the labeled example of class 29. The flowers in the query image have a similar shape and coloration to those in the example of class 29, with a clear red and white color scheme and a ruffled petal edge. In contrast, class 7 has orange and yellow flowers, class 8 has purple flowers, and class 4 has a single yellow flower with a different petal arrangement. Therefore, based on observable visual evidence, the query image is most likely to be classified as class 29.
</explanation>

<response>29</response>
